title: hieracium sparsum subsp. baleanum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. baleanum, also known as the Hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids, tannins, and other compounds that provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Hieracium sparsum subsp. baleanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various ailments.
